title: The 25 Best Drama Schools in the World, 2026
summary: A diploma from one of these ace institutions can launch an acting career. Just ask alums like Meryl Streep, Adam Driver and Cynthia Erivo.

title: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
summary: The unofficial start of the summer travel season on Memorial Day weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
summary: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.
